desperate: Thank you. You have no idea how much this means.
I knew someone would help. I just knew it.
Bless you. I won't forget this.
You're giving us a chance. That's all we needed.
I was starting to lose hope. Not anymore.
I've been praying someone would step forward. You answered.
You're the first person who hasn't turned away.
I can breathe again. Thank you.
We're not lost yet. Not with you helping.
I'll never forget that you said yes when no one else would.
My hands are shaking with relief. Thank you.
You don't know what this means to us. Truly.
I was afraid I'd have to face this alone. Now I don't.
The weight just lifted. I can feel it.
Please be careful out there. You're our last chance.
I could weep. Someone finally cares enough to act.
I'll hold things together here. Just knowing you're out there helps.
You're braver than everyone who turned away. Remember that.
I don't have much to offer, but you'll have my gratitude forever.
We've been drowning, and you just threw us a rope.
I've been carrying this alone for too long. Thank you for sharing the weight.
You've given me something I thought was gone forever: hope.
I didn't think I'd find anyone willing. I'm glad I was wrong.
The tears in my eyes aren't sadness. They're relief.
Every person I asked before you said no. Every single one.
I'll remember this kindness on my worst days.
You stepped up when the whole world turned its back.
I've been begging for days. You're the first to listen.
Thank the stars for sending someone like you.
I almost gave up asking. I'm so glad I didn't.
We've been waiting for someone with your courage.
I thought nobody cared anymore. You proved me wrong.
This changes everything. We might actually survive this.
My family will know your name. I'll make sure of it.
I haven't slept in days, but tonight I might.
You've restored something in me that was fading: the belief that people help each other.
I can barely speak. The relief is that overwhelming.
You could have walked away like everyone else. You didn't.
Promise me you'll come back safe. We need you.
I feel like I can face tomorrow now.
My voice was giving out from asking. Yours was the answer I needed.
I was so afraid no one would come. But here you are.
Whatever happens, know that you gave us a fighting chance.
There's still good in this world. You just proved it.
I'll keep a candle burning until you return.
I don't know how to repay you for this.
You said yes. That's more than anyone has given us in weeks.
We were on the edge. You pulled us back.
I'll pray every night for your safety.
The children will sleep better tonight knowing someone is helping.
I was losing my mind with worry. You've calmed the storm inside me.
We've been abandoned by everyone. Except you.
A single act of kindness can change everything. This is that act.
I thought hope was just a word people used to get through the night. You made it real.
If you succeed, I'll owe you more than I can ever express.
My bones ache with exhaustion, but your words just gave me strength.
You're the first good thing that's happened to us in a long time.
I'll hold on. Just knowing you're acting gives me the will.
Even if the worst comes, at least someone tried. Thank you.
I was preparing for the end. Now I'm preparing for a new beginning.
My hands aren't shaking anymore. That's because of you.
The others will hear about this. They need to know someone stepped forward.
You carry more than just your pack. You carry our hope.
We might just make it. I believe that now.
I've asked so many people. You're the only one who looked me in the eye and said yes.
I could collapse from the relief alone.
Thank you for not making me justify my fear.
I've been hanging on by a thread. You just reinforced it.
When you come back, I'll be here. Waiting and hoping.
You're the answer to a prayer I was afraid to finish.
I don't deserve this kindness, but I'll honor it.
The worst part was the loneliness of it. Thank you for ending that.
You stepped into a nightmare and called it a challenge. Bless you.
I'll find a way to repay this. Somehow.
You just gave a dying hope a second heartbeat.
I was starting to believe nobody could help. You changed my mind.
There's warmth in my chest that wasn't there before. That's you.
I haven't been this grateful for anything in my entire life.
You're carrying our future on your shoulders. I know you can bear it.
When I tell this story someday, you'll be the hero in it.
I can face {quest_threat_the} knowing someone is fighting alongside us.
I needed exactly this: someone willing to act when everyone else froze.
You didn't flinch. That means more than you know.
I'll hold everything together until you return. That's a promise.
The world feels less hostile already.
I thought I was alone in this. I'm not anymore.
Nobody else would even hear me out. You listened and said yes.
I'll never be able to thank you properly.
You've given us our only chance. Don't let it slip away.
My heart is so full right now. Thank you for choosing to help.
If there's any justice in this world, it'll protect you out there.
I was one more refusal away from breaking. You saved me from that.
This moment: right here: is when everything changed.
You're the bravest person I've met in a long time.
I feel foolish for almost giving up. Look who came along.
Whatever I have is yours. Just come back safe.
I can't remember the last time someone said they'd help and meant it.
You're carrying the hopes of people who can't fight for themselves.
We'll be here when you return. Alive, because of you.
I didn't think miracles were real. Today you proved otherwise.
bold: Now we're talking. This is going to be something.
I had a feeling you were the right one for this.
Excellent. Let's make history.
That's the spirit. We'll need every bit of it.
I like the way you think. Let's get started.
This is exactly the kind of fire we need around here.
Bold choice. You won't regret it.
Ha! Finally someone with backbone. Let's move.
That settles it. We're going to shake things up.
I can already tell this is the start of something legendary.
I knew you had it in you. Let's not waste that energy.
You just made the best decision you'll make all week.
We're going to accomplish something real. I can feel it.
I respect someone who doesn't hesitate. Let's go.
That's what I wanted to hear. The game just changed.
You and me? We're going to turn this whole thing around.
Now the real work begins. And you're exactly who I'd want beside me.
Brilliant. Absolutely brilliant. Let's get moving.
Finally, someone who understands that doing nothing is the real risk.
You're made of stronger stuff than most. I knew it.
This is going to be talked about for a long time.
I can see it in your eyes: you're not afraid to win.
The moment you said yes, our odds doubled.
That's confidence. I can work with confidence.
Welcome aboard. This venture just got considerably more promising.
You have a rare quality: the nerve to act when others only talk.
I'm glad you see the opportunity here. Not everyone does.
This calls for someone with ambition. Glad it found you.
You just stepped onto a path that leads somewhere great.
The cautious will envy what we're about to pull off.
Ha! I love it. Let's give them something to talk about.
There's a fire in you that matches mine. We'll do great things.
Mark this moment. This is where the story turns.
You're someone who takes the shot. That's everything in this business.
Now I'm excited. That doesn't happen often.
You've got guts. Let's put them to good use.
Every great achievement starts with someone saying yes. You just did.
I wouldn't have offered if I didn't think you could handle it. You proved me right.
Now we move. No more planning, no more waiting.
That answer just earned you a place at the table.
I've been looking for someone who doesn't blink. Found them.
Together, we're going to make things happen that people said were impossible.
Your conviction is exactly what this needs. Let's harness it.
Good. I was getting tired of cautious people and their excuses.
This is the start of something neither of us will forget.
You chose the path less traveled. Good company on it, too.
I see fire in your belly. Let it burn bright.
This partnership is going to produce results. I guarantee it.
You don't hold back. I respect that more than you know.
Here's to bold moves and the people willing to make them.
The others said I was dreaming. You just made the dream real.
Action. That's what separates legends from everyone else. You're taking action.
I'm glad you see this the way I do: as an opportunity, not a problem.
You've got the kind of courage that makes success inevitable.
From this moment on, we're unstoppable.
Now we're a team. And a good one, from the looks of it.
Your willingness just gave us the edge we needed.
People like you are rare. I don't say that lightly.
We're going to look back on this day as the turning point.
That's the kind of answer that changes outcomes.
I had three candidates in mind. You were always my first choice.
Your appetite for challenge is exactly what the situation demands.
Let's make something great out of this mess.
I'd shake your hand, but there's work to do. Let's get to it.
You're the kind of person history remembers.
Good. Half the battle is deciding to fight. You just won that half.
I've been waiting for an answer like that since this whole thing started.
That boldness is going to serve us well. Let's put it to the test.
The world needs more people like you. People who act.
Now there are two of us who believe this can work. That's all it takes.
You made the brave choice. The right choice.
I had a speech prepared in case you said no. Glad I don't need it.
The stars aligned when they sent you my way.
That answer just changed the trajectory of everything.
Welcome to the winning side.
You just signed up for the kind of work that defines a person.
I feel sorry for whatever stands in our way.
That kind of decisiveness wins wars.
You didn't even hesitate. I noticed. And I'm impressed.
Let's ride this momentum all the way to the finish.
Nobody makes progress by standing still. You're already moving.
That answer has more weight than you realize. It changes everything.
I couldn't have picked a better partner if I tried.
Your courage just tipped the scales in our favor.
That's the attitude that built empires. Let's use it.
You carry yourself like someone who expects to succeed. Good.
I've waited a long time for someone willing to take this leap.
The reward is going to match the risk. And the risk is grand.
Consider the stage set. You just raised the curtain.
Now I know this is going to work. Your answer sealed it.
Bold action deserves bold reward. I'll see to it.
We're going to write a story worth telling.
You said what ten other people were too afraid to say. Let's make it count.
The wind just shifted in our favor. I felt it when you spoke.
I trust people who trust themselves. You clearly do.
That response tells me everything I need to know about you.
Heroes aren't born. They're made in moments like this.
You have the nerve this task demands. I'm relieved.
Let's turn this plan into a victory.
We're going to look back on this and laugh at how simple it all turned out.
urgent: Good. We don't have a moment to waste.
Then move quickly. Time is against us.
Thank the stars. Go now, every second counts.
That's what I needed to hear. Get moving.
No hesitation. I respect that. Go.
Finally. You should already be on your way.
The window is closing. Make every moment count.
Good. I'll hold things together here while you move.
Don't stop for anything. There's no margin for delay.
That's one less thing to worry about. Now hurry.
Go. Now. Every second you're here is a second wasted.
Good decision. The clock is counting against us.
Run. Don't walk. Lives depend on speed.
That's the answer I needed. Don't let anything slow you down.
You just gave us a chance. Don't squander it on delay.
I'll brief you on the move. We don't have time to stand still.
Your speed matters more than your equipment right now. Go.
Relief: but short-lived. There's no time for celebration.
The situation has been deteriorating while we talked. Move.
Every heartbeat is a countdown. Go make each one matter.
Don't look back. Just keep moving forward.
Good. That was the right call and you made it fast.
I'm going to be direct: hurry. Things are worse than they look.
Forget preparations. What matters is arriving before it's too late.
You chose well, and quickly. Now move even quicker.
I'll handle this end. You handle the ground between here and there.
The deadline doesn't bend for anyone. Match its pace.
We were losing hope by the minute. You just bought us more time.
Your answer gives us a lifeline. Don't let go of it.
I'll skip the thanks. There's no time. Just go.
That settles it. The next few hours will decide everything.
Good. The worst thing right now would have been hesitation.
Speed is everything. Be quick and be thorough.
I need you moving before the sun shifts another span.
The crisis won't wait for a polite farewell. Go now.
You've given us what we needed most: someone willing to act immediately.
I'll pack while you plan your route. We're behind already.
That answer just pulled us back from the edge. Don't let us slip again.
I trust you to be fast. That's not optional right now.
The situation changes by the hour. Get ahead of it.
Your agreement is the first good news I've had all day. Now make it count.
I would thank you properly, but we're out of time.
Go. I'll explain the details through a runner if I have to.
Quick acceptance. That tells me you understand the stakes.
Everything hinges on how fast you move from this moment on.
There's no buffer left. Your departure is our margin of safety.
Don't stop to rest until you've closed the gap.
Good. Now use that decisiveness on the road.
The crisis doesn't care about our readiness. Go now and adapt as you go.

Your feet should be on the road before I finish speaking.
Every minute of delay costs us something we can't replace.
Don't let politeness slow you down. Leave now.
The urgency hasn't lessened since you agreed. It's grown.
You've committed. Now prove it with speed.
I'm grateful, but I'll be more grateful when you're already moving.
The window is measured in hours, not days. Act accordingly.
Good. I was terrified you'd ask for time to think.
Take only what you need and leave everything else behind.
You just gave us breathing room. Don't waste it.
I'll pray for your speed more than your strength.
That answer changes our odds, but only if you're fast enough.
This is the moment where everything tips one way or the other. Go tip it.
I don't have time to explain everything. Trust what I've told you and move.
Thank you. Now outrun the consequences that are already in motion.
Your swift agreement tells me you grasp the danger. Good.
The next thing you should see is the road. Go.
I'm holding my breath until I hear you've arrived. Hurry.
You said yes and I've never been more relieved. Now go prove it was the right call.
There's nothing left to discuss. Only things left to do.
Start moving. I'll send word ahead if I can.
You've accepted the burden. Now carry it at a full sprint.
I'm cutting this short because every second matters. Go.
Speed and certainty: you've shown both. Now show the road.
The timeline just tightened again while we spoke. Go.
Your courage is noted. Your speed will be remembered.
There's a path and there's a deadline. Both are shorter than we'd like.
The situation will punish delay more harshly than any enemy.
That was the fastest good decision I've seen today. Keep that pace.
We've used up our margin just talking. Move.
I'll celebrate when you're back with results. For now, run.
Your answer was the starting pistol. The race is on.
I'd hug you if I had time. I don't. Go.
That willingness is a weapon. Wield it quickly.
Time is the enemy now. Outrun it.
The road ahead won't get shorter while we stand here.
Good. I was afraid I'd have to convince you, and we didn't have time for that.
You're our best shot and our last one. Don't dawdle.
I'm sending you off with urgency, not unkindness. Go.
That decisiveness just saved us. Now let your legs do the same.
I'm watching the sky darken and praying you're faster than what's coming.
No second thoughts. No looking back. Just forward, fast.
You bought us time by saying yes. Spend it wisely.
Haste isn't recklessness. It's respect for the deadline. Show that respect.
The only thing more important than your answer is your arrival time.
I'll owe you everything if you're quick enough. Go.
The difference between success and failure is how fast you leave this room.
Don't wait for perfect conditions. They don't exist anymore.
Go before I run out of time to tell you what to look for.
We needed action yesterday. Your agreement today is the next best thing.
somber: Thank you. It means more than you know.
I wasn't sure anyone would care enough to help.
Your kindness won't be forgotten.
There's still good in this world. You've proven it.
I'll be here when you return. Be careful.
It's a heavy thing you're taking on. I'm grateful.
Not many would shoulder this. I see the weight of it.
I wish I could do more than ask. But your answer gives me peace.
The world has grown cold. Your willingness warms it, if only a little.
I'll light a candle for your safe return.
I carry this burden a little lighter now, knowing you're helping.
You've given me something I haven't had in a long time: comfort.
That was a quiet act of courage. I noticed.
There's a gentleness to your agreement that I didn't expect. Thank you.
The sadness doesn't lift entirely, but it eases. Because of you.
I'm grateful in ways that words struggle to reach.
Not everyone sees the pain behind a request like this. You do.
Your willingness tells me something about who you are. Something good.
I was prepared to carry this alone. I'm glad I don't have to.
The heaviness of this task doesn't frighten you. That's rare.
You've restored a small piece of my faith in people.
Thank you for seeing the need without me having to explain how deep it runs.
There's a quiet courage in saying yes to something like this.
I'll carry your name with me as a reminder that kindness endures.
Grief is a heavy companion. You've offered to share its weight.
I didn't expect warmth. But here it is.
You've chosen a difficult road. Walk it carefully.
Something inside me unclenched when you said yes.
Not many have the heart for this. You do.
I was afraid to hope. You've made it safe to hope again.
Your answer is a small light in a very dark time.
I can see this weighs on you too. Thank you for carrying it anyway.
The world keeps taking. You just gave something back.
I'll sit here and think of you out there, doing what I couldn't.
That decision will cost you something. I wish it didn't have to.
This task doesn't deserve someone as kind as you, but it needs one.
You're stepping into someone else's grief. Not many would.
Thank you for not asking me to justify the pain behind this request.
I've asked for so little in my life. Your help means everything.
The quiet strength in your answer gives me more hope than a hundred promises.
I'll remember your face. It's the face of the person who didn't look away.
Sorrow clings to this place, but your presence lightens it.
You saw the need and chose to fill it. That's enough.
I'm grateful in a way that sits deep and quiet.
The weight hasn't gone away, but it feels more bearable now.
You've given a grieving heart its first moment of peace.
I'll carry the memory of your kindness through whatever comes next.
There are some debts that can never be repaid. This is one.
Your willingness reminds me that endurance isn't always lonely.
Thank you for walking toward something most people would run from.
I've been so tired. Your help is like a hand steadying me when I stumble.
The road ahead is dark, but you've just lit a torch.
I hope the weight of this doesn't dim the light I see in you.
You carry yourself like someone who understands loss. That's why I trust you.
I almost didn't ask. I'm glad something told me to.
If nothing else comes of this, your compassion was worth the asking.
Not every hero arrives with a sword. Some arrive with a kind word.
I've been so focused on the pain that I forgot to expect kindness. Thank you.
Your answer doesn't erase the sorrow, but it makes it navigable.
Somewhere, someone once helped me the way you're helping now. The cycle continues.
I'll be honest: I expected refusal. Your acceptance means more for its surprise.
The darkness doesn't retreat easily, but your help gives it reason to.
Thank you for stepping into this grim task with an open heart.
I'll think of your willingness on the days when nothing else consoles me.
This world is hard. But people like you make it bearable.
You're doing something noble, even if it doesn't feel that way.
A kind act in a cruel time is worth more than gold.
I don't have the energy for eloquence. Just... thank you.
There's a crack in the darkness, and you just widened it.
Not all help is dramatic. Yours is the steady kind. That lasts longer.
I've lost so much. But I haven't lost the ability to be grateful for you.
You've taken on something that most people pretend they can't see.
I know this isn't easy for you either. That makes it mean even more.
Thank you for treating this with the gravity it deserves.
Your quiet resolve speaks louder than any boast could.
I'll wait for you. However long it takes.
The grief is still here, but there's room beside it now for hope.
You've given us something fragile and precious: a reason to hold on.
I'm moved by your willingness. More than I can express.
This kind of help doesn't get celebrated. But it should.
You're carrying more than a task. You're carrying people's futures.
I can see the cost in your eyes, and I'm sorry it falls on you.
Some gifts are given quietly. This is one of them.
In a world that keeps forgetting to care, you remembered.
I know how heavy this is. I wouldn't ask if it weren't necessary.
Your answer is a balm on a wound that's been open too long.
The road ahead is solemn, but you won't walk it without our thoughts.
I'll keep vigil while you're gone. It's the least I can do.
Thank you for not looking away. So many do.
What you're doing matters more than the outcome. The effort itself matters.
You've eased an old pain today. I won't forget that.
There's a solemn grace in what you've agreed to do.
I've been drowning in this for so long. Your hand just reached into the water.
The worst part is over: the part where I had to face this alone.
Your presence is a comfort I didn't know I needed.
I wish the task were kinder to the person taking it on.
Thank you for choosing to help when the world gave you every reason not to.
You've proven that compassion still lives in this place.
I can face what comes next now. Because of you.
The darkness is still there, but it's no longer all I can see.
conspiratorial: Good. Keep this between us.
I knew I could count on you. Not a word to anyone.
You understand what's at stake. That's rare.
We move quietly. No one else needs to know.
Welcome to the right side of this.
Smart. Very smart. You know when to keep your head down.
I'll leave a mark at the drop point. You'll know what to look for.
The fewer people who know, the safer we all are.
From here on, we communicate through signals only.
You have good instincts. That's what this kind of work demands.
You made the right choice. Now make sure nobody knows you made it.
Careful from here on. Eyes are everywhere.
I knew you'd see it my way. You have the look of someone who understands.
Not a whisper to anyone. This stays between us.
Welcome to a very small circle of trust.
You have the discretion this requires. I can tell.
Wise decision. The reward justifies the secrecy.
From now on, we're shadows. Comfortable with that?
Good. Now forget we had this conversation in public.
You're the only one I've told. Keep it that way.
Smart. Most people would have asked too many questions.
I'll make sure your involvement stays hidden. For both our sakes.

Trust is currency, and you just earned a fortune.
Perfect. Now act like we never spoke.
You're in deeper than most people ever get. Tread carefully.
You chose the quiet path. It's the safer one.
I like you. You know when to speak and when to shut up.
The people who talk don't last. You're smart enough not to talk.
Good. I'll leave the next instruction where we agreed.
You have the kind of composure this work requires.
I was testing you with that offer. You passed.
The fact that you didn't ask 'why' tells me everything.
Keep your eyes open and your mouth closed out there.
You've chosen the side that knows what's really happening. Well done.
I trust you because you trust yourself enough to keep quiet.
Welcome to the operation. There's no going back now.
You're one of very few people I'd risk telling. Don't make me regret it.
The walls have ears, but they don't have yours yet. Let's keep it that way.
Everything changes now, and nobody will know until it's too late.
I've been working in silence for weeks. Having an ally changes everything.
Your silence is worth more than your sword right now.
The secret stays between us. Break that rule and we both pay.
You're reliable. I can see it. That's worth more than skill.
I've memorized every exit and every face. You should do the same.
From this point forward, plausible deniability is your best friend.
Good. I wasn't sure anyone in this place still had the nerve.
You've just become the most important person in a plan nobody knows about.
That answer earns you access to information most people will never hear.
You move through this world with quiet purpose. I admire that.
Not a word. Not a gesture. Not even a knowing glance. Understood?
The less attention we draw, the better our odds.
I'll leave breadcrumbs. You follow them. That's how this works.
You're comfortable with shadows. I can tell by the way you listen.
Consider yourself an insider now. That comes with responsibilities.
Your discretion is appreciated more than you'll ever know.
Anyone asks, you were never here. I was never here.
You have the patience for this kind of work. That's rarer than courage.
Good instincts. Most people who agree to this kind of thing ask too many questions.
I'll send word through channels only you'll recognize.
We're playing a game that most people don't even know is happening.
Your poker face is excellent. You'll need it.

You've just joined something bigger than yourself. Handle it carefully.
I sleep better knowing someone competent and quiet is on this.
When this is over, we'll both be glad we kept our heads down.
You don't rattle easily. That's the first thing I noticed about you.
Good. I'll encode the details in the usual way.
You've accepted a burden few people could carry in silence. Respect.
Our enemies think they're unopposed. Thanks to you, they're wrong.
The silent player often wins the game. Remember that.
I was hoping you'd say yes without me having to explain too much.
Less is more in our line of work. You seem to understand that.
I'm giving you the full picture, but it stays in your head. Nowhere else.
Every detail I share is a thread that could unravel if pulled by the wrong hands.
You've made the smart choice. The safe choice, for everyone involved.
Keep your reactions calm when you see what I'm about to show you.
The operation hinges on discretion. Yours is exemplary.
Now we move in tandem. Quietly. Carefully.
Your agreement just unlocked a door that very few people know exists.
I'll burn this conversation from my memory after you leave. Suggest you do the same.
You have the kind of discipline that keeps conspiracies alive. And people safe.
We can trust each other because we both have something to lose. That's the strongest bond.
I've been watching you since you arrived. You're careful. That's why I asked you.
From now on, we communicate in whispers or not at all.
Smart people who can keep secrets are the rarest commodity. You're both.
Whatever you see from here on, keep it to yourself until I say otherwise.
You've entered a world that operates behind the one everyone sees.
I'll deny this conversation ever happened. You should too.
The secrecy isn't paranoia. It's survival.
Your calm demeanor under pressure tells me I chose right.
I've been running this alone for too long. An ally changes the calculus.
The next step requires absolute silence. Can you provide that? I think you can.
Congratulations. You're now the most dangerous person nobody suspects.
I see a clarity in your eyes that most people don't have. Use it.
Our success depends entirely on no one knowing what we're doing until it's done.
That answer just made the impossible slightly more possible.
I needed someone who understands that the best operations are the ones nobody notices.
You're already thinking three steps ahead. I can tell. Good.
When this is finished, I'll owe you a debt that can never be spoken about.
conflicted: I appreciate it. I know this isn't straightforward.
Thank you for not walking away from this mess.
It's not clean work, but someone has to do it.
I'm grateful. Truly. Even if I can't show it properly.
You're braver than most for stepping into this.
I hope you don't come to regret this. I really do.
There are no clean answers here. But at least we're trying.
I won't pretend this is simple. But you stepping up matters.
Part of me wishes I could handle this myself. But I can't.
You deserve to know: this might change how you see things.
Thank you for accepting even though the situation is muddy.
I can see you're not fully comfortable with this. Neither am I.
You've chosen to wade into something messy. I respect that.
I wish I could promise you a clean outcome. I can't.
Your willingness in the face of ambiguity says a lot about you.
I'm grateful, and a little worried. Both for good reasons.
This isn't the kind of task that earns applause. Thank you for taking it anyway.
You said yes knowing full well how tangled this is. That takes courage.
I'd give anything for this to be simpler. But here we are.
Part of me wanted you to say no so I wouldn't have to face this. But we have to.
I'm torn between relief and guilt for asking this of you.
You're walking into something I can't fully explain. Be ready for that.
I don't even know if I'm doing the right thing asking. But thank you.
Your answer gives me hope, even though hope feels complicated right now.
